ddls:
CREATE TABLE "defendants" (
  "defendant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each defendant */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race of the defendant */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the defendant */,
  "admission_date" TEXT /* Date the defendant was admitted */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the defendant was released */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the defendant */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the defendant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the defendant */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the defendant */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status of the defendant */,
  "criminal_history" TEXT /* Criminal history of the defendant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("defendant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admission_facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility */,
  "facility_name" TEXT /* Name of the facility */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the facility */,
  "facility_type" TEXT /* Type of the facility (e.g., jail, detention center) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the facility */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the facility */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the facility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "release_facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility */,
  "facility_name" TEXT /* Name of the facility */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the facility */,
  "facility_type" TEXT /* Type of the facility (e.g., courthouse, court) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the facility */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the facility */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the facility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "charges" (
  "charge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each charge */,
  "charge_name" TEXT /* Name of the charge */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the charge (e.g., Felony, Non-Felony) */,
  "charge_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the charge */,
  "legal_reference" TEXT /* Legal reference for the charge */,
  "maximum_penalty" TEXT /* Maximum penalty for the charge */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("charge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bail_statuses" (
  "bail_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bail status */,
  "bail_status_name" TEXT /* Name of the bail status (e.g., Pretrial) */,
  "eligibility" TEXT /* Eligibility for bail (e.g., Eligible, Non-Eligible) */,
  "bail_amount" TEXT /* Amount of bail set */,
  "bail_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions set for the bail */,
  "bail_set_by" TEXT /* Who set the bail (e.g., judge, court) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bail_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admission_records" (
  "admission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each admission record */,
  "defendant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the defendant being admitted */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility where the defendant is being admitted */,
  "admission_status" TEXT /* Status of the admission (e.g., Pretrial) */,
  "admission_date" TEXT /* Date the defendant was admitted */,
  "admission_reason" TEXT /* Reason for admission */,
  "admission_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the admission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admission_records_defendant_id FOREIGN KEY ("defendant_id") REFERENCES defendants ("defendant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admission_records_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES admission_facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "release_records" (
  "release_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each release record */,
  "defendant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the defendant being released */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility where the defendant is being released */,
  "release_status" TEXT /* Status of the release (e.g., Released on Bail) */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the defendant was released */,
  "release_reason" TEXT /* Reason for release */,
  "release_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the release */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("release_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_release_records_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES release_facilities ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_release_records_defendant_id FOREIGN KEY ("defendant_id") REFERENCES defendants ("defendant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "charge_records" (
  "charge_record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each charge record */,
  "defendant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the defendant being charged */,
  "charge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the charge */,
  "charge_date" TEXT /* Date the defendant was charged */,
  "charge_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the charge (e.g., guilty, not guilty) */,
  "charge_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the charge */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("charge_record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_charge_records_charge_id FOREIGN KEY ("charge_id") REFERENCES charges ("charge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_charge_records_defendant_id FOREIGN KEY ("defendant_id") REFERENCES defendants ("defendant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bail_records" (
  "bail_record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bail record */,
  "defendant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the defendant */,
  "bail_status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bail status */,
  "bail_date" TEXT /* Date the bail was set */,
  "bail_posted_date" TEXT /* Date the bail was posted */,
  "bail_posted_by" TEXT /* Who posted the bail (e.g., defendant, family member) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bail_record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bail_records_defendant_id FOREIGN KEY ("defendant_id") REFERENCES defendants ("defendant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bail_records_bail_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("bail_status_id") REFERENCES bail_statuses ("bail_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "court_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each court document */,
  "defendant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the defendant */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of court document (e.g., Arrest Report, Court Transcript) */,
  "document_date" TEXT /* Date the document was created */,
  "document_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the document */,
  "document_file_path" TEXT /* File path of the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_court_documents_defendant_id FOREIGN KEY ("defendant_id") REFERENCES defendants ("defendant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Judge, Court Administrator, Law Enforcement Official) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Specific permissions assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
